entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol supporting concentrated and legacy AMM pools, swaps, farming, voting, automated vaults, and deployed routing infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation and the linked public application identify Ramses as an active multichain DEX and liquidity protocol. The documentation covers concentrated and legacy liquidity, swaps, farming, voting, automated vaults, multichain architecture, and deployed contracts. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Ramses official documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation links the public Ramses application and describes swaps, concentrated liquidity, legacy liquidity, farming, voting, automated vaults, and multichain architecture.

evidence.title: Ramses deployed contract addresses
evidence.notes: Current first-party registry publishes deployed AMM factories, routers, position managers, quoters, gauges, voting, and access-control contracts across supported networks.
